title: Imagineer dave's create+
description: The official modpack of Imagineerdave's SMP create server
body:
The official ImagineerDave's create SMP modpack. (Channel link here ; [https://www.youtube.com/@ImagineerDave](https://www.youtube.com/@ImagineerDave))

The ImagineerDave's create+ modpack adds a variety of mods to make a realistic looking world of your own. Multiple farm / food additions allow for more factorization and decorative mods such as CreateDeco, Copycats+ and Rechiseled allow you to create the world you have always dreamt of. This modpack supports all of ImagineerDave's schematics that can be found over on his discord ; [https://discord.gg/nTM4FDESjk](https://discord.gg/nTM4FDESjk).

The ImagineerDave's SMP world is focussed heavily on the train aspect of create and steam'n rails. These mods together with computercraft allow for complex train networks and more realistic operation.


In order to keep the game running smoothly while you expand your world multiple optimalisation mods are added. This together with Flywheel compat makes it possible to use shaders for the last touch of realism.
